toast.alreadyRunning: Another model is already downloading — please wait for it to finish
toast.modelNotDownloaded: Model "{{model}}" is not downloaded. Please download it from the Models tab first.

error.network: Unable to reach the network. Please check your connection and retry.
error.disk: Not enough disk space. Free up some space and retry.
error.permission: Cannot write to the models directory. Please check folder permissions.
error.remote: HuggingFace server returned an error. Please try again later.
error.verify: Download finished but files are incomplete. Please retry.
error.process: Download process exited unexpectedly. Retry — if it keeps failing, antivirus or low system memory may be blocking it.
error.interrupted: Download was interrupted by app shutdown. Click Retry to resume.
